raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX, XXXX  XXXX ( XXXX ) XXXX XX/XX/year> Home Depot XXXX XXXX Department P.O. XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX Subject : Urgent Resolution Required for Fraudulent Account Activity To Whom It May Concern, I am writing to formally address a critical issue regarding fraudulent activity associated with my Home Depot credit card account Ending in : XXXX, which has severely impacted my credit and overall financial well-being. 

On XX/XX/year>, I was alerted to fraudulent charges made on a Home Depot credit card that I had previously closed. Home Depot was the first entity to contact me regarding this fraudulent activity, and I promptly reported that these transactions were unauthorized. Following this, I was issued a new credit card, which I never activated, as I had made it clear to your XXXX XXXX Department that I did not wish to maintain this account due to the ongoing fraudulent activity continuously occurring. I never had the opportunity to made a purchase either credit card. 

In XX/XX/year>, I spoke with a representative from your XXXX XXXX Department, who assured me that no further action would be taken against me regarding these fraudulent transactions. I am aware that Home Depot and the XXXX XXXX Department maintain a call log of our conversations, including the times I have reported this incident. I request that these logs be thoroughly reevaluated and investigated for accuracy. 

However, to my dismay, I have since received multiple letters indicating late payments and negative reports being filed with the three major credit bureaus. This situation is unacceptable and has negatively affected my credit rating and financial stability. 

I have attempted to resolve this matter through your customer service channels, but I have been met with automated responses and calls that disconnect without any resolution. This lack of support is deeply concerning and has left me with no choice but to escalate this issue. 

I demand that Home Depot take immediate action to rectify this situation by : 1. Closing my Home Depot account permanently, as previously requested.

2. Ensuring that all fraudulent charges are removed from my account records.

3. Contacting the three major credit bureaus ( XXXX, XXXX, and XXXX  ) to correct any negative reporting associated with this fraudulent activity. 

Failure to address this matter promptly will compel me to seek legal remedies and report this incident to the appropriate consumer protection agencies. I expect a written response to this letter within 14 days, confirming that these actions have been taken.
